title: JsMacros
description: Macro and Scripting mod supporting many events and triggers.
body:
This mod allows for the development of scripts to interact with the chat, and other parts of the world, using JavaScript.


## Extensions

Extensions allow you to code in languages other than the default language JavaScript, and some even have performance benefits. 

#### [More about extensions](https://jsmacros.wagyourtail.xyz/?/extensions.html)



![Macro GUI Image](https://wagyourtail.xyz/static/macromenu.PNG)
![Script Generated GUI](https://wagyourtail.xyz/static/guitest.PNG)
